name: Outrageous Chocolate-Oatmeal Chipper (Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 1 stick unsalted butter, at room temperature
1/2 cup light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Place 1 1/2 cups of oats in a food processor and process until fine (about 1 minute).
3. In an electric mixer bowl, beat butter with granulated sugar and light brown sugar until smooth. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
4. Combine processed oats with flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Slowly add to the butter mixture. Stir in remaining oats, chocolates, and almonds.
5. Drop dough by spoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets. Bake until golden brown (about 10 minutes). Cool slightly on sheets before removing. Makes about 40 cookies.
